headline: What GE Vernova's sold-out gas turbines represent for energy company
summary: GE Vernova (GEV) due to release its second quarter earnings figures this Wednesday, July 22, ahead of the market's open. The stock is up nearly 60% year-to-date in 2026. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman is joined by Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley and Bullseye American Ingenuity Fund portfolio manager Adam Johnson to discuss the energy company's gas turbine business.
